_description: Fixed deterministic prompt set for Phase D benchmarks + reviewer smoke. 100 short English prompts spanning factual, narrative, code, and conversational genres. Every benchmark using this set must report which prompts triggered single-token-lock vs healthy generation, so quality regressions are visible.
_license: CC0-1.0 — these prompts are original to this artifact, not from any third-party dataset.
_format: Each prompt is a single string. Tokenize with the Mistral v3 tokenizer (intllm.tokenizer.get_tokenizer) before feeding to the model. Generation length convention: 32 tokens for canonical eval; 5 tokens for run_smoke.sh.
